name: CRYSTALS-Kyber 256-point PE1 FNTT/INTT RTL
description: Single-processing-element CRYSTALS-Kyber polynomial NTT core copied from kyber-polmul-hw, with forward and inverse NTT checked against the original PE1 vector files.
implementation_notes: This is the PE_NUMBER=1 KyberHPM1PE top from kyber-polmul-hw.
The harness checks both A and B polynomial banks.
FNTT output uses the kyber-polmul-hw mixed order: 4m+0, 4m+2, 4m+1, 4m+3.
INTT input uses the same mixed order and output is read as m, m+128.

observable_contract.fntt_input_order: din carries coefficient k for k=0..255 after one load_a_f/load_b_f cycle.
observable_contract.fntt_output_order: read sequence maps samples to output[4m+0], output[4m+2], output[4m+1], output[4m+3] for m=0..63.
observable_contract.intt_input_order: din carries input[4k+0], input[4k+2], input[4k+1], input[4k+3] for k=0..63 after one load_a_i/load_b_i cycle.
observable_contract.intt_output_order: read sequence maps samples to output[m], output[m+128] for m=0..127.

score.primary: minimize operation wait cycles after start pulse
